diagnostics: State the minimal facts required to proceed.
Which subtask yields the highest info gain at lowest cost?
What non-LLM algorithm or cached artifact can replace a call?
planning: Decompose into ≤4 atomic actions with clear IO.
Pick tools with O(1) or O(log n) cost over tokenized calls.
compression: Rewrite the prompt in ≤60 words; keep nouns/IDs only.
Replace prose with fields; force JSON output.
escalation_checks: Is expected delta in utility > token cost?
quality_gates: Are all required fields present and valid?
Is confidence score within acceptable range?
fallback_strategies: Degrade to smaller model with tighter prompt
Return cached partial result with confidence warning
